nasb.text: Now when day came, the chief magistrates sent their policemen, saying, “Release those men.”

esv.text: But when it was day, the magistrates sent the police, saying, “Let those men go.”

cnv.text: 到了天亮，裁判官派法警來，說：“放了這些人！”

ccb.text: 第二天早上，官长派差役来，说：“把他们放了。”

csbs.text: 天亮的时候，官长们派刑杖官来说：“把那两个人放了吧！”
